prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical fashion poster featuring Hania as the huge background title, with a stylish young woman seated confidently in a low black chair amid dense orange smoke clouds.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, high-resolution editorial streetwear style, saturated monochrome orange background, dramatic studio lighting, sharp subject detail, deep shadows, premium magazine-cover composition.

Main subject: One young woman centered in the lower half, relaxed dominant pose, leaning back in a black metal-framed chair with one leg extended toward the camera and the other bent. Her face is covered by a centered opaque medium-brown square censor block. She has long dark wavy hair visible around the block. Outfit: exactly 5 visible fashion pieces — oversized glossy orange puffer jacket, fitted black shirt, dark black cargo pants, silver chain necklace, and white-orange-black chunky sneakers. One hand rests on the chair arm, the other relaxed near her lap.

Environment: Thick orange smoke clouds surround the chair and legs, especially dense along the bottom edge, left side, and right lower corner. Use a warm orange gradient backdrop with darker smoky shadows near the floor.

Typography and layout: Place one enormous white italic bold sans-serif word “Hania” behind the subject, spanning almost the full width, cropped slightly by the edges and partly hidden behind her head and jacket. The word should be tilted subtly and feel like a sportswear campaign headline.

HUD / graphic overlays: Add thin white futuristic interface lines, tiny labels, boxes, and symbols around the edges. Include exactly 12 discrete overlay groups: 1) top-left small square icon with the stacked words “DISCIPLINE / FOCUS / CONFIDENCE / SUCCESS”; 2) top-center thin horizontal progress line with small blocks and dots; 3) top-right “07” with “LIMITLESS / EDITION”; 4) left-middle slogan “BE YOU / DO YOU / FOR YOU”; 5) left-lower outlined status card showing “% / 100 / FOCUS / MODE / ON”; 6) lower-left small quote “DON’T STOP / UNTIL YOU’RE / PROUD.” with tiny dot marks; 7) bottom-left small globe icon and caption “BUILDING MY / DREAM LIFE”; 8) right-upper tiny line and stacked words “MIND / ENERGY / AMBITION / DISCIPLINE”; 9) right-middle circular globe target icon; 10) right-middle vertical plus, line, arrow, and the words “HUSTLE / SILENCE / RESULTS”; 11) right-lower small geometric squares and the words “TRUST / THE PROCESS”; 12) bottom-right outlined data card reading “B SYS / 07”, “STAY FOCUSED / STAY HUNGRY / STAY HUMBLE”, plus tiny square indicators.

Visual style: Cinematic streetwear advertising poster, bold orange-and-white color palette, clean futuristic microtypography, crisp high-contrast lighting, realistic fabric texture on the puffer jacket, volumetric smoke, shallow depth of field, no extra people, no watermark. Keep all overlay text white and small, with the giant title as the dominant graphic element.
